checks.label: Role state schema version is supported.
Role state user matches workspace current user.
Active role exists in workspace roles.
Selected preview role exists in workspace roles.
Default preview role exists in workspace roles.
Every available preview role exists in workspace roles.
Active project exists in workspace projects.
Active project package path exists locally.
Role state does not allow user writes.
Role state does not allow design generation.
Role state does not allow public publish.
Role state does not allow external network access.
Every visible module references a known tool.
KosmoDesign is the primary visible module for this demo state.
Every blocked action references a known gate.

visible_modules.reason: Reference and project knowledge can be inspected locally.
Asset review evidence can be inspected locally.
Current Orbit prototype focuses on the KosmoDesign review handoff.
Prepare is visible as planned context, but not active in this demo shell.
Draw handoff stays summary-only until model-quality review is closed.
Viz is planned and remains blocked from generation in this state.
Publish stays visible but blocked by publish and rights gates.
Zentrale runtime is external to this static repo and only shown as status.

blocked_actions.label: Generate Design
blocked_actions.reason: Context and human-review gates are not approved.

blocked_actions.label: Publish Public
blocked_actions.reason: Publish and rights gates remain blocked in the local demo.

blocked_actions.label: Start Cloud Job
blocked_actions.reason: Cost gate is local-only and external network access is disabled.

next_actions: Use this role state as the data contract for the next role-aware Orbit prototype pass.
Keep this check in the full review before adding real interaction or routing.
Do not treat this role state as auth; it is a local UI contract only.
